name: Sweet Potato Fries
recipeIngredient: 1 pound sweet potatoes, cut into 1/2-inch sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Line a cookie sheet with foil and spray with Pam cooking spray.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the orange juice concentrate, onion powder, salt, and cayenne pepper.
4. Add the potato sticks to the bowl and turn them to coat evenly.
5. Arrange the coated potato sticks in a single layer on the oiled foil sheet.
6. Bake for 10 minutes, then carefully turn the fries and bake an additional 10 minutes or until tender.
7. Total calories per batch: 416
Fat: 1 gram
Taste: Pretty good
From Weight Watchers Quick Meals
